solutions.solution:
A cube of side 4 cm is painted black on all of its surfaces and then divided into various smaller cubes of side 1 cm each. The smaller cubes so obtained are separated.

Total number of cubes so obtained = (4 × 4 × 4)/(1 × 1 × 1) = 64

Here, n = Side of bigger cube/Side of a smaller cube = 4/1 = 4

(i) Number of smaller cubes with three surfaces painted = 8
(ii) Number of smaller cubes with two surfaces painted = (n - 2) × 12 = (4 - 2) × 12 = 24
(iii) Number of smaller cubes with one surface painted = (n - 2)² × 6 = (4 - 2)² × 6 = 4 × 6 = 24
(iv) Number of smaller cubes with no surface painted = (n - 2)³ = (4 - 2)³ = (2)³ = 8
